summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel features completed. All 10 features tested and working: Admin login, Order Management with tabs and details modal, Order Edit functionality, Users page with search, User creation form, Roles tab with default roles, Stripe Settings page, Marketing & SEO page with Tracking and SEO tabs.
seed_data_creation: Used existing orders and users for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin panel features tested and working. Login endpoint is /api/auth/admin/login (not /api/auth/login). Admin credentials: admin@suitsindia.com / admin. Key pages: /admin/dashboard, /admin/orders, /admin/users (with Roles tab), /admin/stripe, /admin/marketing

1_admin_login.details: Admin login works via portal selection -> Admin -> login form. Endpoint: /api/auth/admin/login

2_order_management_page.details: Orders page shows tabs (All, WIP, Placed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered), search functionality, orders table with Order ID, Customer, Products, Total, Status, Payment, Date, Actions

3_order_details_modal.details: Clicking order row opens comprehensive modal with: Customer info, Configuration (Fabric/Lining/Button), Styling Options with images, Measurements & Allowances, Pricing breakdown, Admin Comments section

4_order_edit_functionality.details: Edit Order button shows Cancel/Save buttons, enables editing of Payment Method, Payment Status, Admin Comments, and measurement allowances

5_users_page.details: Users page shows user list with Admin badges, email, role, payment methods. Search functionality and Add User button present

6_create_user_form.details: Add User dialog has all fields: Email, Password, Full Name, Phone, Company, Address, Role dropdown, Payment Methods (Bank Transfer, Stripe), Active User toggle

7_roles_tab.details: Roles tab shows default roles: Admin (Full system access), Reseller (Can create orders for customers), Sales Partner (Can manage their assigned resellers). Create Role button available

8_stripe_settings_page.details: Stripe Settings page has Publishable Key input, Secret Key input (masked), Use Test Keys button with test keys displayed, Save Stripe Settings button, instructions for resellers

9_marketing_tracking_tab.details: Marketing page Tracking tab has Meta Pixel (Facebook) with toggle and Pixel ID input, Google Analytics 4 with toggle and Measurement ID input

10_marketing_seo_tab.details: SEO Settings tab has Default Meta Tags (Site Title, Meta Description, Keywords), Social Media Preview (OG Title, OG Description, OG Image URL), Save All Settings button

backend_tests_summary.TestAdminAuth: 3/3 passed - login success, invalid password rejection, auth/me endpoint
backend_tests_summary.TestAdminOrderManagement: 4/4 passed - get all orders, filter by status, update status, full order update with comments
backend_tests_summary.TestAdminUserManagement: 4/4 passed - get users, create user, update user, delete user
backend_tests_summary.TestRolesManagement: 4/4 passed - get roles, create role, update role, system roles protection
backend_tests_summary.TestStripeSettings: 3/3 passed - get settings, update settings, get public key
backend_tests_summary.TestMarketingSettings: 3/3 passed - get settings, update settings, track event
